raw_text:
Datasets for "Resolving the microscopic hydrodynamics at the moving contact line"

Datasets for the article:
"Resolving the microscopic hydrodynamics at the moving contact line" 
Amal K. Giri, Paolo Malgaretti, Dirk Peschka, and Marcello Sega
Phys. Rev. Fluids 7, L102001
DOI: 10.1103/PhysRevFluids.7.L102001
Includes:

GROMACS input files
Modifications to the GROMACS source code thermostat as described in the article
Instructions on how to invoke the patched version of GROMACS with decoupled directions
Matlab datafiles with FE solutions and scripts to analyse and compare them to MD velocity field (also included)

 
See also: 
https://github.com/Marcello-Sega/pytim
https://github.com/dpeschka/stokes-free-boundary
